indhold: Hello! Need a plane moved or ferried? I'll be happy to fly your plane to its new home domestically & internationally! I'm CSEL/IR rated (MEL in progress, Aztec) w/ over 500TT and experienced in the Piper Cherokee family (PA-28 & PA-32), Piper Arrow/Colt/Lance, Cessna 150/172/182RG/G1000 182/206, Mooney M20 (Johnson Bar/Electric Gear) & Beechcraft Debonair/Bonanza. I'm CPLX/HP/TW endorsed (Silvaire Luscombe 8A) and insured up to $250,000, COI in Specs Page. SEL $349/day CONUS/CA/AK, $549/day International, MEL $549/day CONUS/CA/AK, $749/day International, flying 8 hrs/day. See y’all at SNF!

2013 Extra 330LT. 634 hrs TT.  This Extra is a great ride. My two young daugters now have me wrapped around their little fingers.  Sadly, I don't have much time to fly anymore. No damage history. Always hangared. Aspen EFD 1000. MVP-50P Engine Monitor. Garmin GNS 430. Garmin GTX 328 Transponder. Smoke System. Heater. Baggage compartment. Price includes 2 2023 Softie Mini parachutes. I am a rated CFI in the aircraft and can help train and/or ferry if required.
